testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'LAPTOP-9AFG13RK', ip: '192.168.29.4'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session.
